title: CropCycle
description: CropCycle is a Minecraft Fabric mod for version 1.21.11 that automatically harvests and replants fully grown crops when you right click them, using seeds from your inventory. It streamlines farming, saving time while keeping gameplay balance.
body:
# CropCycle

A simple quality-of-life mod that automatically replants crops when you harvest them. No more tedious replanting after every harvest!

## How It Works

Right-click any fully grown crop with an empty hand, and CropCycle will automatically:
- Harvest the crop (with all drops, including Fortune bonuses)
- Consume one seed from your inventory
- Instantly replant the crop

## Supported Crops

- Wheat
- Carrots
- Potatoes
- Beetroots
- Nether Wart

## Features

- **Server-side only** - Works with vanilla clients, no client installation needed
- **Smart detection** - Only triggers on fully grown crops
- **Shift to disable** - Hold shift while harvesting to disable auto-replant
- **Creative friendly** - Seeds aren't consumed in creative mode
- **Fortune compatible** - Respects Fortune enchantments for bonus drops
- **Multiplayer safe** - No duplication exploits
- **Configurable** - Toggle individual crops and effects via config file

## Configuration

After first launch, edit `config/autoreplant.json` to customize:
- Enable/disable specific crops
- Toggle particle effects
- Toggle sound effects

## Perfect For

- Large-scale farming operations
- Reducing farming tedium
- Server owners wanting to improve farming QoL
- Players who value efficiency

No complicated mechanics, just simple automatic replanting that works exactly how you'd expect.
